body.title: BOOT SEQUENCE consolidation: verify no duplication on restart
body.result: Audit complete — no bug. Each restart creates unique BOOT SEQUENCE node (15/15 distinct IDs). Working as designed.
body.description: Top 5 hot nodes (heat 448-478, 633-674 hits/48h) are all BOOT SEQUENCE consolidation_pass nodes. Verify each restart generates a NEW node (correct) vs re-activating the same node repeatedly (would indicate dedup or caching bug). Check consolidation_pass logic.
